# accessflow_datasource (Data Source)

Look up an existing datasource by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "accessflow_datasource" "prod" {
  id = "11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555"
}

output "prod_db_type" {
  value = data.accessflow_datasource.prod.db_type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Datasource UUID.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean)
- `ai_analysis_enabled` (Boolean)
- `ai_config_id` (String)
- `database_name` (String)
- `db_type` (String)
- `host` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `organization_id` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `review_plan_id` (String)
- `ssl_mode` (String)
- `username` (String)
